blockingIssues.description: The code change restores the missing await/error-path behavior for recording_select_images, but commit 87c8881fe53b824f8422aaac712a2251d8ddba82 again bundled out-of-scope version bumps in package.json, packages/extension/manifest.json, and packages/extension/manifest.firefox.json.

The message-factory alias compatibility regression is fixed, but commit ef83ed72ba2d90b4a0b3221327191aebbd117bab again bundled out-of-scope version bumps in package.json, packages/extension/manifest.json, and packages/extension/manifest.firefox.json.

Commit d38896db0846c26d5b39b34c39faf75ed3885a67 restores HEAD version metadata to 0.4.60, but it does not create clean replacement commits for extension-refactor-agent-loop, extension-refactor-tool-executor, extension-refactor-error-handling, extension-refactor-ai-sdk, and extension-refactor-tools, so the original per-feature version-bump scope violations remain in git history.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a hard post-commit/HEAD diff gate for non-release refactors and fixes that rejects any change to package.json, packages/extension/manifest.json, and packages/extension/manifest.firefox.json before workers can declare success.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Round 1 already failed five extension-core refactors for bundled version bumps, and round 2 repeated the same scope violation in fix commits 87c8881fe53b824f8422aaac712a2251d8ddba82 and ef83ed72ba2d90b4a0b3221327191aebbd117bab. Restoring the versions later in d38896db0846c26d5b39b34c39faf75ed3885a67 still left the original offending commits in history.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Do not allow `skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true` unless the handoff explicitly lists every mandated final validator (including integration test when required, lint, check:repo-standards, and final diff review), or require an explicit deviation entry for each skipped step.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The prior extension-core scrutiny round already found a worker claiming `followedProcedure: true` without integration-test evidence, and round 2 repeated the pattern in fix-ext-recording-await: its handoff listed only typecheck, unit tests, build, grep, and wc -l while still claiming full procedure compliance.
